content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Broad selloff with Nifty -1.5%, VIX +10.5% to 19.27, all sectors red except IT defensives. FII outflows continue. Pockets of strength: results-driven names (BANDHANBNK, COALINDIA, SUNPHARMA on Organon deal, CHENNPETRO), oil/refining cluster on Brent at $120, and shipping. Holding book is in profit overall (+₹7.7k unrealized). Long weekend approaching with macro tail risk — bias is to lock in gains via SL trails on winners, exit on broken theses, and add highly selective new positions only with strong catalysts.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23700,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1029.88,
      "new_target": 1075.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "PNBHOUSING +5.7%. Current SL 1029.88 is already above entry (locks in ~4.6% gain) — keeping SL there is correct (LTP 1039 means SL only ~1% below CMP, tight enough). Lowering target from 1110 to 1075 because stock has run from 817 to 1052 in 3 weeks; 1075 = +9.2% from entry, more achievable in remaining swing window. Holding through into long weekend with locked-in gains is acceptable given Q4 beat and rate-cycle tailwind."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "GOLDBEES -2.1%, SL at 119 (~2.6% below CMP). Defensive hedge into long weekend with crude shock and geopolitical risk; gold thesis intact (JPM target $5,055 by Q4 2026). SL well below VWAP support of 121.90 and Bollinger lower 119.61 — appropriate. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1430.00,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "NESTLEIND +2.1%, CMP 1449. Current SL 1442 is ABOVE CMP (1449) — that's at high risk of stopping out on noise. Loosening SL slightly to 1430 (below entry 1412.94 was prior, but stored SL is 1442, which I cannot lower). Wait — guardrail prevents loosening. Reverting: keep SL at 1442 not viable since it's above LTP. Switching to HOLD plan. Note: prior SL 1442 above CMP 1449 is the trail-gap-discipline failure mode warned about. Cannot loosen via MODIFY. Will switch to HOLD and accept stop-out risk."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SUNPHARMA +2.0%, SL 1762 (~0.3% below CMP 1767) — already at breakeven+. Strong Organon deal catalyst, generics tariff exemption preserves US revenue. Q4 results May 21 is a binary risk window but still 3 weeks out — not within next 3 sessions. Hold with current tight SL; let winner run toward 1830."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 478.00,
      "new_target": 495.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "COALINDIA +3.2%, hit fresh 52-week high at 491.25. SL 478 is appropriate (1.2% below CMP 483.80, still locks +1.9% gain). No-op on SL (already at 478). Lowering target from 500 to 495 to make it more reachable for a partial book opportunity in coming sessions; stock approaching R1 491.25. Strong relative strength in down tape + ₹5.25 final dividend declared. Hold the trail."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "BANDHANBNK -1.4%, CMP 196.94, SL 195. Q4 PAT +68% YoY, NIM 6.2% best-in-cohort, JM target raised to 200, Nuvama upgrade. Stock at 52-week high. Tight SL at 195 (-1% below CMP) is appropriate for a post-results momentum name that gapped up 10%. Hold with disciplined SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 297.00,
      "new_target": 322.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "ONGC at breakeven (CMP 302.35, entry 302). Tightening SL from 290 to 297 (1.7% below CMP) — reduces per-position risk. Brent at $120, fresh 52-week high yesterday at 302.40, Bullish Marubozu on 4/28, 2.2x volume. Pure upstream beneficiary of Hormuz blockade. Keep target 322 (~6.5% upside)."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 0,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 0,
      "stop_loss": 0,
      "target": 0,
      "confidence": 0.0,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SKIP — already held; not adding (avoid over-concentration in energy cluster with ONGC + RELIANCE consideration)."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TECHM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "reasoning": "Up 3.7% but on only 0.8x volume — weak volume confirmation. MACD bearish crossover. Post-Q4 stock fell 1.79% — Street unconvinced on growth. Cognizant Q1 today is unknown read. Skip — confidence below threshold."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ITC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "reasoning": "Cigarette price hike rumour driving 3-session rally on a single channel-check report. Q4 in May with Nomura projecting -3.5% volume decline — binary event risk. Multiple brokerage downgrades post Feb-1 tax shock. Buy-the-rumour exhaustion risk. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.40,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results TODAY at 16:00 IST — binary event within hours. Stock already down -2.1% pre-print, stock had rallied +14% into print (sell-the-news risk). Hard rule: do not enter new CNC with binary catalyst within 3 sessions. NO_ACTION."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "RELIANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT -12.6% miss already known, range-bound 1220-1340 through April. Energy cluster exposure already via ONGC + COALINDIA. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "CHENNPETRO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 (PAT +203%) and GRM tailwind, but $15/bbl government margin cap is a hard ceiling already being approached, and OMC price-freeze proposals are a recurring overhang. Stock at fresh 52-week high after 3-session rally — risk of profit-booking around dividend record date. Energy cluster (ONGC held) discipline argues against a second name. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "reasoning": "Q4 beat headlined but management LOWERED FY27 AUM guidance to 24-25% — first explicit deceleration. Rajiv Bajaj exiting board. Stock had run +16% into print, muted +1% reaction = sell-the-news. Bonus 4:1 + Split 1:2 is a retail event, not fundamental catalyst. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "SYNGENE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.30,
      "reasoning": "Bearish research: FY26 PAT -20%, margin compression to 25%, single-client (BMS) concentration risk crystallised, 26% US tariff direct hit, stock down 41% YoY. Today's intraday +5.5% is dead-cat bounce around earnings call. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 30,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 1542.00,
      "stop_loss": 1490.00,
      "target": 1645.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "GESHIP at 52-week high. Tanker rates at extremes on Hormuz blockade since Feb 28: Aframax +44%, Suezmax +21%, VLCC +11%. Q3 PAT +37% YoY baseline; Q4 results May 8 will capture peak Hormuz quarter. Position sizing: 30 shares × ₹1542 = ₹46,260 (~4.6% of capital). SL 1490 (3.4% below entry) — risk = 30 × 52 = ₹1,560 = 0.16% of portfolio, well within risk budget. Target 1645 = +6.7%, R:R = 1:2.0. Exit before May 8 results if not reached (binary event discipline). New cluster: Services/Shipping — no existing exposure."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "reasoning": "Already have an OPEN BUY 1500x PHARMABEES CNC LIMIT @ 23.65 placed 4584m ago (3+ days). Order has NOT filled — likely stale. Should cancel rather than stack. Note: this is a pending order, not a position — cannot MODIFY. Will let it expire or cancel separately; not adding new entry."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1029.88,
      "reasoning": "SL already locks in ~4.7% gain above entry. CMP 1039 leaves only 1% gap to SL — disciplined. Letting target reduce to 1075 to allow exit on a realistic level."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive long-weekend hedge, SL at 119 has appropriate room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 1442 is awkwardly close to CMP 1449 — but cannot loosen (guardrail). Accept stop-out risk; if it triggers, lock in +2% gain. Do not waste a MODIFY no-op."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1762 is tight, ~0.3% below CMP. Q4 May 21 still 3 weeks out — manage closer to event. Organon deal narrative supportive."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 478.00,
      "reasoning": "SL no-op (already 478). Lowering target to 495 to make partial-book reachable; 52w high momentum + dividend yield ~6% supports continued hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 195 disciplined for post-results momentum trade. Brokerage upgrades and 6.2% NIM support upside toward 218."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 297.00,
      "reasoning": "Tightened SL from 290 to 297. Brent shock + 52w high breakout + Bullish Marubozu signal — let it run to 322 with 1.7% downside risk."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "CHENNPETRO and ONGC remain the cleanest energy-shock plays — already expressed via ONGC. RELIANCE relative strength notable but Q4 miss and range-bound action keep it lower-conviction. HUL Q4 print at 16:00 IST today — review tomorrow for post-print entry if price stabilizes above 2240 support. BANDHANBNK and BAJFINANCE rotation pattern (turnaround vs compounder) is a theme to watch in Q1 prints late July.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployed 45% with substantial cash (₹547k) — well within rules. Added GESHIP for shipping cluster diversification on Hormuz catalyst. Existing book has 6 winners + 1 small loser — overall +₹7.7k unrealized. SLs are now disciplined across all positions with locked-in gains on PNBHOUSING (+4.7%), COALINDIA (+1.9%), SUNPHARMA (+1.6%). Critical concern: rolling 5-day win rate is only 11% with profit factor 0.2 — must avoid overtrading. Today's actions are conservative: trail winners, exit none, add only one high-quality new entry with strong catalyst + defined risk (₹1,560 max loss). Pending PHARMABEES order from 3+ days ago should be reviewed/cancelled — stale. No new positions into HUL Q4 binary event today. Long weekend macro risk priced via ONGC (oil), GOLDBEES (gold), NESTLEIND (defensive FMCG)."
}
